states.description: Joplin note list inside a notebook/folder
visual_cues: current notebook name (e.g. Personal, Finance, Ideas)
list entries some with 'to-do:' prefix and checkbox
list of notebook names (Ideas, Finance, Projects, etc.)

states.description: Results for the current search query
Opened single note showing content (e.g. recipe with Ingredients/Instructions)
visual_cues: note body with sections like Ingredients/Instructions

transitions.postcondition: note list for chosen notebook shown

strategies.name: ANSWER_IS_TODO_BY_PREFIX
steps: If note visible in current notebook, inspect whether its row has 'to-do:' prefix / checkbox
If not visible, open sidebar and switch notebooks or use Search to locate the note
Answer True if the entry has the to-do checkbox/prefix, else False
strategies.success_signal: answer(True/False) matches presence of 'to-do:' prefix on the row
strategies.fallback: Use Search to find the note by title when scrolling does not surface it

strategies.name: COUNT_TODOS_IN_FOLDER
steps: Count list rows whose content description starts with 'to-do:' (have a checkbox)
strategies.success_signal: numeric answer equals number of 'to-do:' prefixed rows in the notebook
strategies.fallback: Scroll the list to ensure all entries are considered

strategies.name: LOOKUP_FIELD_IN_NOTE
strategies.preconditions: android_home; note title known, field/ingredient known
steps: Read the relevant section (e.g. Ingredients:) and extract the value
strategies.success_signal: answer reflects the exact value found in the note body
strategies.fallback: If search yields nothing, open sidebar and browse candidate notebooks

dead_ends.note: Agent incorrectly assumed Joplin was not installed; should always try open_app(Joplin) first

dead_ends.failed_action: scroll(down) in wrong notebook looking for a note
dead_ends.note: Target note may belong to a different notebook; must switch notebooks via sidebar or use Search instead of scrolling blindly
Gave up too early without using Search or switching notebook
Agent looped emitting the same answer many times instead of issuing status(complete)

categories.name: QUERY_ITEM_ATTRIBUTE
categories.precondition: Target item is identified by name; app may not be in foreground
abstract_steps: Launch the relevant app from the launcher
Navigate to the named item by browsing the list or using an in-app lookup affordance
Inspect the visible marker/attribute (icon, prefix, checkbox) that indicates the attribute in question
Return a boolean/categorical answer based on the marker
failure_modes: Declaring the task infeasible from the launcher without attempting to open the app
Answering based on a screen that does not actually contain the target item
Looping on the same answer action without finalizing with a completion status
verification_checklist: The target item's row is actually visible on screen
The attribute marker is unambiguously present or absent
A single completion/status signal is emitted after the answer

categories.name: COUNT_ITEMS_BY_ATTRIBUTE
categories.precondition: A container (folder/list/category) and a filtering attribute are specified
abstract_steps: Open the app and navigate to the specified container via its navigation drawer/menu
Enumerate all list entries, scrolling as needed to cover the full list
Count entries whose row carries the filtering attribute marker
Return the count as a number
failure_modes: Counting within the wrong container because the app opened to a different default
Confusing unrelated visual markers with the target attribute
verification_checklist: Current container label matches the requested one
List has been scrolled to end or confirmed fully visible
Only entries with the specific attribute marker are counted

categories.name: LOOKUP_FIELD_IN_ENTRY
categories.precondition: Entry title and desired field/sub-item are specified
abstract_steps: Open the app and invoke its entry-lookup affordance
Provide the entry title and select the matching result
Locate the section containing the field and read its value
failure_modes: Skipping app launch and declaring infeasible
Opening a wrong result with a similar title
Reading from the wrong section of the entry
verification_checklist: Opened entry title matches the requested one
Value is read from the correct labeled section

categories.name: NAVIGATE_TO_CONTAINER
categories.precondition: Multiple containers exist; a specific one is required
abstract_steps: Locate the named container (scroll if necessary)
failure_modes: Assuming the currently opened container is the target
Missing the target entry because it resides in a different container
verification_checklist: Header/title of the list reflects the requested container name
